rows.protocol_note: Official OpenAI GPT-5.6 release-page comparison table dated 2026-07-09. The table does not state one common reasoning effort for every model; rows remain protocol_variant. Latency and API cost are estimated from production behavior and offline simulation, with latency at fast API speeds and cost at regular API pricing. Cyber evaluations use reduced safeguards. ExploitBench uses the API harness with 5 seeds and reasoning continuity. ExploitGym was run on a faster alpha API and latency-rescaled; it reports two- and six-hour caps, so the comparison-table maxima carry a time-budget caveat.
